title: cacalia scapigera
intro: Cacalia scapigera, also known as Cacalia, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Compositae, native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cacalia scapigera include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Cacalia scapigera can be prepared into various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
